news.headline: THIRDREALITY introduces Smart Color Bulb ZL1 with Repeater Functionality at an unbeatable price, targeting evolving smart home market.
news.summary: In San Jose, California on October 10, 2024, THIRDREALITY unveiled the Smart Color Bulb ZL1 in response to the changing smart home market. Consumers are increasingly looking for products that offer advanced features beyond basic functions. This new smart bulb is both powerful and cost-effective, catering to this demand.

news.headline: Telenor Group deepens partnership with Google Cloud for data capabilities to enhance digital transformation.
news.summary: The Telenor Group has revealed a strengthened collaboration with Google Cloud to hasten Telenor's digital transformation via enhanced data functionalities. The announcement was made from Oslo, Norway, and Stockholm on October 10, 2024. Telenor Group, a prominent technology-focused communication services provider, aims to leverage Google Cloud’s expertise in this partnership. This strategic move is designed to drive Telenor's digital evolution by leveraging cutting-edge data capabilities.

news.headline: 1MORE introduces SonoFlow Pro HQ51 headphones with premium sound quality at competitive price. Breaks barriers in hi-res sound.
news.summary: 1MORE is proud to introduce the SonoFlow Pro HQ51 Over-Ear Headphones, which are setting new standards in sound quality by offering premium audio performance along with impressive features, at an affordable price. The company, based in SHENZHEN, China, made this announcement on October 10, 2024. 1MORE is known for being a top innovator in acoustics and the SonoFlow Pro HQ51 Over-Ear Headphones continue this tradition by delivering exceptional sound quality.

news.headline: Windward sees strong contract momentum starting H2 2024 with key customer wins in commercial sector. #WNWD #MaritimeAI
news.summary: London-based Windward, a prominent Maritime AI firm listed on the LSE under the ticker WNWD, has reported significant business achievements post the first half of 2024. Notably, the company has secured several key customer contracts, maintaining a steady momentum in the commercial sector. The exact number of new customer wins was not disclosed in the announcement.

news.headline: Liquid eKYC partners with Docusign for secure contract signing with biometric authentication. TOKYO, Oct. 10, 2024.
news.summary: Enhancing the security of electronic contract signing, Liquid, Inc., a part of the ELEMENTS Group, collaborates with Docusign, a leading Intelligent Agreement Management firm. The partnership aims to bolster identity verification through biometric authentication for more secure transactions. The initiative, launched in Tokyo on October 10, 2024, seeks to combat fraud and enhance user confidence. These measures are anticipated to significantly decrease unauthorized activities and ensure a more trustworthy digital experience.

news.headline: StreamUnlimited partnered with Realtek to launch Stream210, using Ameba RTL8730E core, meeting high technical standards.
news.summary: Vienna, October 10, 2024 - The Ameba RTL8730E has been chosen as the central component of a new module due to its ability to meet the rigorous requirements of technically intricate products. Realtek's IoT Product Line Manager, Angus Hsu, emphasized that the Ameba RTL8730E stands out for its superior size, power efficiency, and cost-effectiveness, making it a top choice for the project.

news.headline: German Real Retail Sales MoM Actual 1.6% (Forecast -, Previous -1.2%)
German Real Retail Sales YoY Actual 2.1% (Forecast -, Previous -1.7%)
Americas Executions partners with Broadridge for securities lending, using SFCM platform to drive growth. (Character count: 108)
news.summary: A broker-dealer company headquartered in New York, known as Americas Executions (AmerX), has recently adopted the Securities Finance and Collateral Management (SFCM) technology platform developed by Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. This move is intended to boost growth for AmerX, as they aim to enhance their operations with the help of this global fintech leader. Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc., traded on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol NYSE: BR, is recognized for its innovative technological solutions in the finance sector. This collaboration signifies a strategic investment by AmerX in leveraging cutting-edge technology to drive their business forward.

news.headline: Lectra launches Valia Fashion platform to accelerate fashion industry's transition to Industry 4.0, making production more sustainable. Paris, Oct. 10, 2024.
news.summary: A revolutionary digital platform is driving the shift of fashion companies towards Industry 4.0, enhancing fashion production and promoting sustainability. Lectra, a key player in this initiative, is leading the charge in Paris on October 10, 2024. This platform aims to streamline operations and optimize processes, ultimately increasing efficiency and reducing environmental impact. Through this technology, companies are embracing modernization, with a focus on sustainability and innovation in the fashion industry.

news.headline: NIPPON EXPRESS HOLDINGS fully acquires SH HoldCo GmbH, a German logistics group; deal closed on Oct. 10, 2024.
news.summary: In Tokyo on October 10, 2024, Nippon Express Holdings, Inc. (NXHD) has finalized a deal to purchase all shares of Simon Hegele, a German group of companies known for contract logistics. The acquisition was made after an agreement with SH HoldCo GmbH, the shareholders of Simon Hegele. This move signifies NXHD's expansion strategy and foothold in the European market.

news.headline: Storebrand & Google Cloud expand partnership to enhance financial services in Nordics; Storebrand has 2M+ customers in Norway & Sweden.
news.summary: In a recent development on October 10, 2024, in Oslo, Norway, and Stockholm, Google Cloud has extended its collaboration with Storebrand, a prominent financial institution in the Nordic region. Storebrand caters to over two million clients in Norway and Sweden, offering services such as pensions, savings, insurance, and banking products. This expansion signifies a deeper integration between the two entities, aiming to enhance their existing partnership for bolstering services to a significant customer base.

news.headline: Cornish Metals hires Endeavour Financial to secure financing for South Crofty Tin Project construction.
news.summary: Cornish Metals has recently selected Endeavour Financial to act as their financial adviser in securing project financing for the development of South Crofty. The appointment aims to facilitate acquisition of funds necessary for the construction of the project. This decision comes at a significant time as the project requires substantial investment, with estimated costs ranging in the millions. By partnering with Endeavour Financial, Cornish Metals is taking a crucial step towards moving the South Crofty project forward and bringing it to fruition.

news.headline: NZ Banking Association picks obconnect for Confirmation of Payee ecosystem delivery.
Aircall launches Aircall Workspace for customer communication, with 19,000 customers, 1,500 partners, 600 employees.
news.summary: A company based in New York, Aircall, is commemorating its first decade with numerous achievements including 19,000 customers, 1,500 partners, and a workforce of 600 global employees. The major announcement for their future success is the introduction of Aircall Workspace, a development that aims to propel the platform towards further growth in the next decade. Aircall Workspace enhances the current platform by providing a redesigned user experience and incorporating conversations from various channels, including voice.

news.headline: Avacta plans to reveal new cancer therapy programs at the 2024 EORTC-NCI-AACR Symposium, showcasing pipeline growth.
UK Municipal operations divestment completion reached its finalization.
Company buys back 2,000 of its own shares.
news.summary: In the latest update, it was reported that there has been a significant increase in the unemployment rate, reaching a record high of 14.7% in the month of April. This surge in job losses is directly attributed to the ongoing global pandemic, which has led to businesses shutting down and laying off workers. The number of unemployment claims also soared, with over 20 million claims filed in the past month alone. Additionally, the GDP saw a sharp decline of 4.8% in the first quarter of the year. These statistics paint a grim picture of the current economic situation, with experts warning of potentially more severe consequences in the coming months.

news.headline: Pharming Group to reveal Q3 2024 financial results on Oct 24. Presentation for analysts and investors at 13:30 CEST/07:30 EDT.
news.summary: Confirming from Leiden, the Netherlands, on October 10, 2024, Pharming Group N.V. ("Pharming") announces the forthcoming release of its preliminary (unaudited) financial results for the third quarter of 2024, covering the period up to September 30. The report is scheduled to be disclosed on Thursday, October 24, 2024. Additionally, Pharming will conduct a presentation for analysts and investors at 13:30 CEST/07:30 EDT on the same day. Pharming trades on Euronext Amsterdam under the ticker PHARM and on Nasdaq under the ticker PHAR.

Norwegian CPI YoY Actual 3% (Forecast 3.2%, Previous 2.6%)
28K users hit by crypto malware, $6K stolen by attackers.
news.summary: In recent months, tens of thousands of devices were affected by a malware infection that facilitated cryptojacking and theft. Despite this large-scale impact, the attackers were able to siphon off a relatively modest sum of approximately $6,000.

news.headline: Chinese stocks experience high volatility as Ministry of Finance briefing draws attention.
Snoop Dogg discusses upcoming music and future plans in recent interview.
Catch Snoop Dogg discussing his upcoming music and future plans in an exclusive interview.
Europe Edition of the Bloomberg Open will focus on cutting costs.
Snoop Dogg gears up for the Olympics in a unique way.

Basilea receives fourth milestone payment from Asia Pacific/China for strong Cresemba® sales performance.

Sipchem to Begin Turnaround Maintenance of IPC Plant
GIS to list Al Koot Insurance and Reinsurance in Qatar
BW LPG updates Q3 2024 segment performance of Product Services, with estimated gross profit of USD 71 million.
news.summary: Singapore-based company BW LPG Limited, listed as BWLPG.OL on OSE and BWLP on NYSE, has released an update on its BW Product Services division's performance in Q3 2024. In the quarter ending on September 30, 2024, BW Product Services generated an estimated gross profit of around USD 71 million. This significant profit was largely driven by approximately USD 86 million derived from unrealized marked-to-market values of open cargo contracts and hedging transactions.

news.headline: BenevolentAI, a leader in AI for drug discovery, will present on "Explainable AI in Drug Discovery" at BioTechX Europe 2024.
news.summary: In London, BenevolentAI (Euronext Amsterdam: BAI), a prominent player in leveraging advanced AI for speeding up biopharma drug discovery, stated that Dr. James Malone, the Chief Technology Officer, is scheduled to deliver a presentation titled "Building Trust and Explainability in using AI in Drug Discovery" at BioTechX Europe in Basel on October 10, 2024, at 11:45 AM CET. The session will delve into the benefits of explainable artificial intelligence in enhancing transparency within drug discovery processes.

news.headline: Secretary of State Blinken Attends ASEAN Summit in Laos
Megaport introduces NaaS to Milan, providing cloud connectivity for Italy-based and global enterprises.
news.summary: Megaport, a leading NaaS provider, has launched a platform in Brisbane, Australia, aimed at delivering rapid, convenient, and secure cloud connections to businesses worldwide, including those in Italy. This technology offers seamless integration for global enterprises and is part of Megaport's initiative to enhance connectivity for businesses internationally.

news.headline: Nokia to release Q3 and Jan-Sep 2024 interim report on Oct 17, 2024.
Kyriba upgrades AI-Driven Liquidity Performance Solutions to empower CFOs with financial agility and operational connectivity.
news.summary: In Paris, Kyriba has improved its AI-powered liquidity performance solutions to enhance CFOs' financial agility and operational connectivity. The update aims to provide more support to CFOs by leveraging artificial intelligence to enhance liquidity performance. This move is anticipated to create significant value for the company and benefit a wide range of financial executives.

news.headline: Pharming Group begins Phase II trial of leniolisib for PIDs with immune dysregulation, focusing on altered PI3Kẟ signaling.
news.summary: A clinical trial is set to assess the effectiveness of leniolisib in individuals with primary immunodeficiencies (PIDs) who have immune dysregulation due to abnormal signaling in lymphocytes associated with PI3Kẟ. This proof of concept trial aims to study how leniolisib can potentially address this condition in these individuals. The trial will involve testing leniolisib on a specific number of participants with PIDs to determine its impact on their immune dysregulation. The importance of this trial lies in its potential to provide valuable insights into the treatment of PIDs with immune dysregulation, offering hope for individuals struggling with this condition.

news.headline: Alipay+ transactions triple by 2024 in travel industry due to digital payment innovations. Global partnerships bring benefits.
news.summary: Alipay+, the cross-border mobile payment and digitalization solution by Ant International, recently highlighted three key trends influencing the future of tourism. The President of Ant International, Douglas Feagin, emphasized the significance of innovation and partnerships in driving economic growth through tourism. The Alipay+ solution now includes cross-border payments, providing opportunities for global merchants and the industry as a whole. With tourism being a vital factor in economic development, the focus is on expanding access to maximize its benefits.

news.headline: Fagron's Q3 2024 performance sees 12.1% revenue growth, reaffirms full-year outlook. Nazareth/Rotterdam, 10 Oct 2024 - 7:00 AM CET.
news.summary: Important information under regulation was disclosed today, announcing developments from Nazareth, Belgium, and Rotterdam, the Netherlands, on October 10, 2024, at 7:00 AM CET.

news.headline: Valneva holds investor day in NYC, presenting growth plans and strategies.
Database from Good Jobs First monitors corporations' regulatory infringements in 45 countries, revealing US$700 billion fines paid by big corporations since 2010.
news.summary: Since 2010, globally recognized companies have collectively paid a staggering US$700 billion in monetary fines for regulatory violations across 45 different countries. A significant portion of these penalties, over one-third, are shouldered by major banks, particularly those situated in the United States and Europe.

news.headline: Nine penal institutions in Canton of Zurich have awarded a major contract to Ascom for installation of Security Support System.
Roche's VENTANA CLDN18 RxDx Assay receives CE certification as the first companion diagnostic for gastric/GEJ cancer. Allows eligibility for VYLOY treatment.
news.summary: In Basel on October 10, 2024, Roche declared that the VENTANAⓇ CLDN18 (43-14A) RxDx Assay has obtained CE Mark approval as the primary immunohistochemistry (IHC) companion diagnostic test for identifying CLDN18 protein levels in tumors of individuals diagnosed with gastric or gastroesophageal junction (GEJ) adenocarcinoma. Patients meeting this criteria could potentially receive treatment using Astellas’ precision medicine VYLOYTM (zolbetuximab). This marks a significant advancement in personalized cancer care, as patients now have access to a targeted therapy option following this CE Mark approval.

news.headline: World Living Soils Forum ends in France, calls for collective action to protect soils. Moët Hennessy & ChangeNOW host event.
news.summary: In Arles, France on October 10, 2024, Moët Hennessy, the Wines & Spirits segment of LVMH, alongside ChangeNOW, a prominent advocate for ecological and social transformation, successfully wrapped up the World Living Soils Forum (WLSF) second edition at LUMA Arles. This global event focused on sustainability and innovative solutions attracted a notable number of participants and industry experts, highlighting the importance of fostering environmental and social progress.

news.headline: Intellum announces winners of 2024 Growth Makers Awards recognizing customers' transformative achievements.
news.summary: Intellum, a leading provider of learning management technology, recently revealed the winners of its first-ever Growth Makers Awards. This event, held in Atlanta on October 10, 2024, aimed to celebrate customers who have demonstrated outstanding success in leveraging education to achieve transformative business outcomes. The awards recognize the exceptional achievements of these customers in driving growth, with a focus on innovation and success in the field. This initiative highlights the impact of education on business success and showcases the significant results achieved by the award recipients.

news.headline: EfTEN Real Estate Fund AS sold property for 4,675,000 euros below book value, generating 1.9 million euros. Invested in logistics centers.
news.summary: In September, EfTEN Real Estate Fund AS’s subsidiary, EfTEN Tähesaju tee OÜ, completed the sale of its property situated at Tähesaju road 5, Tallinn. The property fetched 4,675 thousand euros in the sale, representing a 452 thousand euros reduction from its book value. The transaction resulted in 1.9 million euros in cash receipts after settling outstanding loans. The fund then reinvested these proceeds into prepayments for logistics centers at Härgmäe Str. 8 / Piimamehe Str. 7 and Paemurru road 3 in Tallinn.

news.headline: Gemcorp Capital granted license for operating in Abu Dhabi
